programs.title: The Assembly
programs.desc: Nicola Sturgeon has the grilling of a lifetime from neurodivergent interviewers. Why did she separate from her husband? Who does she most loathe in politics? Nothing is off limits.

programs.title: Holiday Havoc: Where Should You Go? Tonight
programs.desc: As rising costs and global turmoil create uncertainty, Charlotte Hawkins reports on what the changing holiday market means for your next getaway.

programs.title: The Neighbourhood
programs.desc: Graham makes a surprise visit to the triumphant alliance with a game-changing decision, and a friendly village BBQ explodes into a shouting match when tensions boil over.

programs.title: How to Clean Up for Cash
programs.desc: Josie and the gang help Tim box up and value his girlfriend Sally's lifetime of collections behind her back. Can she part with her possessions and take the cash.

programs.title: Unwind with ITV
programs.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
